description: Whether hooks can inject messages, system prompts, or conversation context into the agent's active session.

amp.mechanism: Amp hooks cannot inject context into the agent session beyond the pre-execute 'send-user-message' action that cancels the tool call

claude-code.mechanism: Hooks return systemMessage field in JSON output to inject context into agent's active session

cline.mechanism: context_modification_output: Cline hooks can inject additional context into the agent's session via hook output

codex.mechanism: hook_system_message: Codex hooks can inject a system message into the agent's active session context

copilot-cli.mechanism: Copilot CLI hooks cannot inject context into the agent session

crush.mechanism: The hook JSON response may include an optional context field; this content is injected into the agent context for the current turn.

cursor.mechanism: Hooks can inject context at session initialization via the sessionStart event, enabling custom context to be added to the agent's active session at startup.

factory-droid.mechanism: additionalContext field in PostToolUse, UserPromptSubmit, and SessionStart hook output injects information into the agent session; systemMessage field in JSON output provides session-level injection

gemini-cli.mechanism: Gemini CLI hooks cannot inject context into the agent session

kiro.mechanism: Kiro hooks cannot inject context into the agent session

pi.mechanism: before_agent_start handlers return { message: { customType, content, display } } to inject a persistent message stored in session and sent to LLM; context handlers return { messages } to modify the message array before each LLM call

windsurf.mechanism: Windsurf hooks cannot inject context into the agent's active session
